title: Masayoshi Son watch-list — Vision Fund, 10x thinking, learn Python
html:
Masayoshi Son watch-list — Vision Fund, 10x thinking, learn Python

Source: 2022-02-28 Apple Note. Yahir takes notes from (apparently) a Masayoshi Son talk or interview — distilling 10 imperatives for himself, including the first explicit "do python and learn to code" written down.

TL;DR

  • Notes pulled from a Masayoshi Son (SoftBank, Vision Fund) appearance — Yahir's earliest captured engagement with Son's worldview.
  • Key Son-isms surfaced: "Think bigger, 10x bigger", "You become like those you surround yourself with", "Your inputs become your output", "AI certified future", "Metaverse certified future".
  • Self-imperatives extracted: make a list of associates, evaluate each one ("would I be alright working for that person"), think 5 min/day about inventions using "the 3 different methods", "Do python and learn to code".
  • The python imperative appears here for the first time — by fall 2022 he's signing up for OSU CS classes.
  • Foreshadows the much larger Chinese language Masayoshi Son class presentation in late 2024 (raw/google-docs/2024-11-20).

Pattern observed

Son becomes one of Yahir's mentors-from-afar alongside paul graham, mark cuban, and chamath palihapitiya. The 10x thinking + global vision frame shows up later in Rankett's $5k → $100k/mo trajectory (2025 12 19 rankett 12 month business plan) and in the AI search thesis.

Open questions

  • Which Son talk/podcast was this from? Vision Fund earnings call or a YouTube interview?
  • Did Yahir actually do the "5 minutes about inventions, 3 methods" practice? (Looks like one-time captured rather than habit.)

Related

  • mark cuban
  • paul graham
  • yahir thesis ai search 2022 2026
  • osu — CS-major pivot started here
